text: As I stand in this bright, modern hallway, viewing the glowing purple lights through glass, I feel a heightened sense of curiosity. The environment breathes creativity and forward-thinking. Entering the R+D space, I am met with vibrant colors and words about research and innovation. The poetic text on the display invites me into reflection—there's a hum of possibility here, a sense that the boundaries between thought, art, and technology are thin and lively. I feel inspired, a little awed, and eager to see what new questions stir within me.
